Hero Bio
data.text: A cybernetic idol streaming rhythm games, late-night karaoke, and chaotic art sessions. Come hang out in chat!

data.name: Card Body
data.text: 8 PM EST — request your favorite songs in chat!

data.name: Card Body
data.text: 7 PM EST — chasing that S-rank, wish me luck!

data.name: Card Body
data.text: 9 PM EST — screaming with friends, bring snacks.

data.name: Card Body
data.text: Noon EST — chaos, prizes, maybe a costume change.

data.name: Post Excerpt
data.text: Chat noticed my hand clip through the mic for half a second and I had to play it off as a 'new feature.' 10/10 save.

data.name: Post Excerpt
data.text: After three redesigns my rigger finished the winter fit — debuting it live this Saturday, come see!

data.name: Post Title
data.text: Chat helped me name my plushie army

data.name: Post Excerpt
data.text: We now have Sir Fluffington, Noodle, and a suspiciously judgmental owl named Gerald. Send help.

data.name: Footer Text
data.text: Built with 💖 using the Idol1st Virtual Site Builder — © 2026 Luna Vale

data.name: Hero Paragraph
data.text: A node-based, drag-and-drop site builder made for idols and creators. Wire together HTML, CSS, and JS visually — no terminal, no build step, just a canvas full of glowing nodes.

data.name: Feature Body
data.text: Connect HTML, CSS, and JS nodes visually on an infinite canvas — the engine compiles the graph into a real site.

data.name: Feature Body
data.text: Every edit compiles straight into an iframe preview, so you see your stage update in real time.

data.name: Feature Body
data.text: Chain CSS Rule nodes together for deterministic, cascade-safe stylesheets without writing a single file.

data.name: Feature Body
data.text: Drag in images and audio, get instant local previews, and attach them straight onto elements.

data.name: Feature Body
data.text: One JS Event node can bind to dozens of elements at once — true many-to-one event logic.

data.name: Feature Body
data.text: Flatten your whole graph into clean, dependency-free HTML/CSS/JS ready to host anywhere.

data.name: Step Body
data.text: Add HTML pages, CSS files, JS files, and content nodes anywhere on the canvas.

data.name: Step Body
data.text: Drag connections between nodes to build DOM structure, cascading styles, and event bindings.

data.name: Step Body
data.text: Chain CSS Rule nodes for cascades, and reuse JS Event nodes for hover glows and click logic.

data.name: Step Body
data.text: Compile the graph into a real static site and share your idol page with the world.

data.name: Tech Paragraph 1
data.text: Idol1st runs on Agraph, a custom Directed Acyclic Graph engine. Unlike a rigid DOM tree, a DAG lets many elements share the same CSS Rule or JS Event node, so one glow effect can power an entire site.

data.name: Tech Paragraph 2
data.text: Every edge is edge-painted with a rootId so the compiler always knows which file owns a connection, keeping HTML structure, CSS cascades, and JS bindings perfectly deterministic on export.

data.name: CTA Heading
data.text: Ready to Build Your Own Idol Stage?

data.name: Footer Text
data.text: Idol1st VSB — crafted for creators, powered by graphs. © 2026
